ddls:
CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the student belongs to */,
  "major" TEXT /* Major of the student */,
  "year_of_study" INTEGER /* Year of study of the student */,
  "gpa" REAL /* Grade Point Average (GPA) of the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department offering the course */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor teaching the course */,
  "credits" INTEGER /* Number of credits for the course */,
  "course_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructors" (
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor */,
  "instructor_name" TEXT /* Full name of the instructor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the instructor */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the instructor belongs to */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the instructor */,
  "office_hours" TEXT /* Office hours of the instructor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assessments" (
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assessment */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the assessment belongs to */,
  "assessment_name" TEXT /* Name of the assessment */,
  "grading_scheme" TEXT /* Grading scheme used for the assessment (e.g., letter grade, percentage) */,
  "weightage" REAL /* Weightage of the assessment in the overall grade */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date of the assessment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grades" (
  "grade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grade */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student receiving the grade */,
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assessment the grade belongs to */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade received by the student (e.g., A, B, 85%) */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback provided by the instructor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grades_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grades_assessment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessment_id") REFERENCES assessments ("assessment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grade_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "grade_id" INTEGER /* ID of the grade the comment belongs to */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment left by the instructor */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the comment was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grade_comments_grade_id FOREIGN KEY ("grade_id") REFERENCES grades ("grade_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assessment_criteria" (
  "criterion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each criterion */,
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assessment the criterion belongs to */,
  "criterion_name" TEXT /* Name of the criterion */,
  "weightage" REAL /* Weightage of the criterion in the overall grade */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the criterion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("criterion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assessment_criteria_assessment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessment_id") REFERENCES assessments ("assessment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "criterion_scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each score */,
  "grade_id" INTEGER /* ID of the grade the score belongs to */,
  "criterion_id" INTEGER /* ID of the criterion the score belongs to */,
  "score" REAL /* Score received by the student for the criterion */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback provided by the instructor for the criterion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_criterion_scores_criterion_id FOREIGN KEY ("criterion_id") REFERENCES assessment_criteria ("criterion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_criterion_scores_grade_id FOREIGN KEY ("grade_id") REFERENCES grades ("grade_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student enrolling in the course */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course being enrolled in */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date of enrollment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the enrollment (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_enrollments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_grade_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the statistic belongs to */,
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assessment the statistic belongs to */,
  "average_grade" REAL /* Average grade for the assessment */,
  "median_grade" REAL /* Median grade for the assessment */,
  "std_deviation" REAL /* Standard deviation of grades for the assessment */,
  "pass_rate" REAL /* Pass rate for the assessment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_grade_stats_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "department_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the statistic belongs to */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the statistic belongs to */,
  "average_grade" REAL /* Average grade for the course */,
  "median_grade" REAL /* Median grade for the course */,
  "std_deviation" REAL /* Standard deviation of grades for the course */,
  "pass_rate" REAL /* Pass rate for the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_department_stats_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algo_assessments" (
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assessment */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the assessment belongs to */,
  "assessment_name" TEXT /* Name of the assessment */,
  "grading_scheme" TEXT /* Grading scheme used for the assessment (e.g., letter grade, percentage) */,
  "weightage" REAL /* Weightage of the assessment in the overall grade */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date of the assessment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_algo_assessments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maths_assessments" (
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assessment */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the assessment belongs to */,
  "assessment_name" TEXT /* Name of the assessment */,
  "grading_scheme" TEXT /* Grading scheme used for the assessment (e.g., letter grade, percentage) */,
  "weightage" REAL /* Weightage of the assessment in the overall grade */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date of the assessment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maths_assessments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cie_assessments" (
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assessment */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the assessment belongs to */,
  "assessment_name" TEXT /* Name of the assessment */,
  "grading_scheme" TEXT /* Grading scheme used for the assessment (e.g., letter grade, percentage) */,
  "weightage" REAL /* Weightage of the assessment in the overall grade */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date of the assessment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cie_assessments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tim_assessments" (
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assessment */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the assessment belongs to */,
  "assessment_name" TEXT /* Name of the assessment */,
  "grading_scheme" TEXT /* Grading scheme used for the assessment (e.g., letter grade, percentage) */,
  "weightage" REAL /* Weightage of the assessment in the overall grade */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date of the assessment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tim_assessments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "phys_assessments" (
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assessment */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the assessment belongs to */,
  "assessment_name" TEXT /* Name of the assessment */,
  "grading_scheme" TEXT /* Grading scheme used for the assessment (e.g., letter grade, percentage) */,
  "weightage" REAL /* Weightage of the assessment in the overall grade */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date of the assessment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_phys_assessments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "elec_assessments" (
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assessment */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the assessment belongs to */,
  "assessment_name" TEXT /* Name of the assessment */,
  "grading_scheme" TEXT /* Grading scheme used for the assessment (e.g., letter grade, percentage) */,
  "weightage" REAL /* Weightage of the assessment in the overall grade */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date of the assessment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_elec_assessments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "archi_assessments" (
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assessment */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the assessment belongs to */,
  "assessment_name" TEXT /* Name of the assessment */,
  "grading_scheme" TEXT /* Grading scheme used for the assessment (e.g., letter grade, percentage) */,
  "weightage" REAL /* Weightage of the assessment in the overall grade */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date of the assessment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_archi_assessments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assessment_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assessment the file belongs to */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the file */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., PDF, DOCX) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assessment_files_assessment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessment_id") REFERENCES assessments ("assessment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "submission_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "grade_id" INTEGER /* ID of the grade the file belongs to */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the file */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., PDF, DOCX) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the file */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date of submission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_submission_files_grade_id FOREIGN KEY ("grade_id") REFERENCES grades ("grade_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grade_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade received by the student */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the grade was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grade_history_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grade_history_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)
